_comment_1: Example MCP config for Codex. Copy to .codex/mcp.json and fill credentials. NEVER commit .codex/mcp.json.
_comment_2: Authority: docs/decisions/ADR-023-agentic-portability-and-context.md. Source of truth for MCP entries: templates/config/mcp_registry.yaml.
_comment_3: Per ADR-023 I-3, every MCP requires user_confirmed install on Codex — this file documents intent only.

github._comment: Required for: release-checklist, security-audit, rule-audit. Scope your PAT to repo:read + workflow:read; never admin:org.

kubectl._comment: Required for: debug-ml-inference, incident, rollback. ALWAYS pass --read-only — write paths are STOP per AGENTS.md.

terraform._comment: Required for: release-checklist, cost-audit. Plan/validate only; apply is STOP per ADR-015.

prometheus._comment: Required for: drift-detection, performance-degradation-rca, incident, performance-review.

playwright._comment: Optional for release-checklist browser smoke flows when the service exposes a UI.

_install_invariant: Per ADR-023 I-3, no template script installs or starts these servers. Adopter triggers MCP setup manually inside Codex; this file is documentation, not orchestration.
